top_signals.title: China’s Collapsing Crude Oil Imports to Fall Further in June
top_signals.summary: The world’s top crude oil importer is set to take even fewer barrels this month, extending its exceptionally subdued appetite since the start of the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines, UAE and Indonesia to Start CPTPP Accession Talks
top_signals.summary: The Philippines, United Arab Emirates and Indonesia will start talks about joining a regional trade bloc, the next step for the three in efforts to expand free-trade ties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Philippines fears China may move to seize full control of disputed atoll - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Philippines fears China may move to seize full control of disputed atoll  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: BitGo cuts 15% of staff to refocus on AI infrastructure and stablecoins
top_signals.summary: BitGo CEO says the firm will now focus on key areas, including security, trading, stablecoins, settlement, and AI-powered infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Names of prosecution inquest panel in Yamaguchi leaked
top_signals.summary: Sources in the prosecutor's office said that a document naming the panel members was mistakenly sent to a petitioner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
